name: copilot-stop-envelope-taskid
description: #47 D2/D3/section 5.7 mode (a): a Copilot CLI compat-layer SubagentStop payload (agent_name present, NO agent_type; transcript_path snake_case) whose report transcript ends with a starcar-artifact envelope carrying `task-id: X` yields a `returned` record whose subject IS the shop-minted id X (subject_basis=minted-id), because the compat stop payload carries no unique pairing key (agent_name is the agent TYPE, not a pairing id - superseded design 3b-5). outcome/findings/abstract come from the envelope. Provenance: payload keys OBSERVED - agent_name and transcript_path are the compat stop shape quoted in docs/design/2026-07-24-dual-runtime-harness-design.md section 3b (3b-5 agent_name, 3b-2/3b-7 transcript_path); the raw capture .claude/probe-logs/subagent-stop.jsonl is gitignored runtime output, not in the tree. The transcript is read through the ONE-HOME reader (scripts/lib/TranscriptRead.ps1 via Get-LastAssistantText), whose Claude-jsonl assistant-message shape is OBSERVED in-repo from scripts/tests/fixtures/payloads/transcript-car.jsonl and is shared across runtimes by design D5; no fixture KEY is invented. Expected record is DESIGN-MANDATED (subject-from-envelope-task-id + subject_basis=minted-id are new #47 work; the base producer at df4fb95 does not recognise agent_name at all and exits 0 silently). NOTE: this pins the envelope-task-id subject path only - the separate events.jsonl toolCallId->arguments.name JOIN path (for a Copilot stop whose report carries NO task-id) stays an honest boundary, its OBSERVED events.jsonl shape being absent from the tree (see the scope note in this directory's README).

transcript: {"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Do the task and end with the envelope."}]}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Report body.

```starcar-artifact
task-id: 51-car-r1
outcome: done
findings: none of note.
abstract: The Copilot adapter car finished the fixture task.
```
"}]}}

record.subject: 51-car-r1
record.abstract: The Copilot adapter car finished the fixture task.
